description:
Antagonistic quality review of `hx-skeleton` (T2-04) **after implementation completes**.

Review every file in `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-skeleton/` critically.

**Audit areas:**
1. TypeScript — strict, variant (text/circle/rect/paragraph) typed, dimensions typed
2. Accessibility — `aria-hidden="true"` on all skeleton elements (decorative), live region announcing when content loads, `prefers-reduced-motion` stops pulse animation, axe-core pass
3. Tests — all shape variants, animation states, reduced motion, content-loaded state transition, 80%+ coverage
4. Storybook — all variants, loading→loaded transition demo
5. CSS — `--hx-*` tokens, shimmer/pulse animation, CSS parts
6. Performance — bundle < 5KB, animation is CSS only
7. Drupal — Twig-renderable

**Output:** Write findings to `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-skeleton/AUDIT.md` with severity (P0/P1/P2). DO NOT fix — document only. Commit AUDIT.md as your PR.
title: AUDIT: hx-skeleton — T2-04 antagonistic quality review
